title: The Last Signal
logline: A desperate crew on a dying colony ship uncovers a mysterious signal that could save humanity.

acts.summary: The crew receives the signal, but it's too late to save the colony ship.
The crew struggles to understand the nature of the signal while trying to find a way out of their doomed situation.
The crew deduces the signal is from another civilization, leading them to believe there might be hope for humanity.

world_rules: All life forms must survive at all costs.
